top.name: Fabricate Armor
top.rules_text: Gain 5 armor. If adjacent to a construct gain 5 instead.

channel.name: Fabricate Armor (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Adjacent construct also gains 2 armor

bottom.name: Salvage
bottom.rules_text: Destroy a construct you control within range 3. Gain 2 mana and draw 1 card. Gain 2 armor per 4HP the construct had remaining.

channel.name: Salvage (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Gain 2 mana and 2 cards instead
